description: Navigate to https://www.wikipedia.org in Firefox. Inspect the site's security certificate using the browser's built-in tools (e.g., via the padlock icon, 'Connection secure', then 'More information' and 'View Certificate'). Once the full certificate viewer opens (about:certificate), find the download link for the main certificate and download it in 'PEM (cert)' format. Ensure the downloaded file is saved in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.
